ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of student registration */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the bill belongs to */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the bill was generated (e.g., January, February) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the bill was generated (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the bill */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "rebate_count" INTEGER /* Number of rebates applied to the bill */,
  "rebate_amount" REAL /* Total rebate amount */,
  "nonveg_total_bill" REAL /* Total amount for non-vegetarian meals */,
  "total_bill" REAL /* Total bill amount after rebates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebate_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebate program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the rebate program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rebate program */,
  "rebate_type" TEXT /* Type of rebate (e.g., fixed amount, percentage-based) */,
  "rebate_value" REAL /* Value of the rebate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rebate program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rebate program */,
  "eligibility_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of eligibility criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebate_eligibility" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility criteria */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rebate program the criteria belongs to */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Type of criteria (e.g., GPA, year of study) */,
  "criteria_value" REAL /* Value of the criteria */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebate_eligibility_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES rebate_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_rebates" (
  "rebate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebate */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the rebate was applied to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rebate program the rebate belongs to */,
  "rebate_amount" REAL /* Amount of the rebate */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the rebate was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_rebates_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_rebates_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES rebate_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the change was made to */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the change was made to */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column the change was made to */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., billing, rebate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
